description_en: A stone monument associated with Ranchi Kochuken, known as the nerite-ishi. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1977-12-01. It is located at Shimomaki 2390.

name_en: Copy of Matsu Ichibee's Direct Appeal
description_en: An old document, a copy of the direct appeal (osso-jō) of Matsu Ichibee. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1977-12-01. It is held at the Tsukiyono Local History Museum.
A stone monument, a Manyoshu poem monument (kahi). It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1977-12-01. It is located at Gokan (Tone River riverbed).
A stone monument, a stele prohibiting entertainments (kingei-hi) at Gyokusen-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1980-06-01. It is located at Gokan 2920-2.
A stone monument, a slab stupa (itabi) of the Jowa era. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1980-06-01. It is held at the Tsukiyono Local History Museum.
A stone monument, a slab stupa (itabi) of the Einin era. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1980-06-01. It is located at Kamitsu 2313-1.

name_en: Hanging Buddha Plaque of Fuji Sengen Shrine
description_en: A craft work, a hanging Buddha plaque (kakebotoke) of Fuji Sengen Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1981-02-26. It is held by the shrine parishioner representative.

name_en: Stone Pillar Six Jizo at Oana
description_en: A stone monument, a stone pillar (sekidō) bearing the Six Jizo at Oana. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1981-02-26. It is located at Oana 187.
A sculpture of the Ten Kings (Enma-o) dating from the Oei era. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1981-02-26. It is located at Fujiwara 4002.

name_en: Votive Tablet of Suguri Hachiman Shrine
description_en: A painting, a votive tablet (ema) of Suguri Hachiman Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 1981-07-05. It is located at Kamitsu 1233.

name_romaji: Hinawajū Mei “Ansei Ninen Sangatsu Kichijitsu Jōshū Numata-jū Imai Sadatoshi”
name_en: Matchlock Gun Inscribed by Imai Sadatoshi of Numata (1855)
description_en: A craft work, a matchlock gun (hinawajū) inscribed with a date corresponding to 1855 and the maker Imai Sadatoshi of Numata in Joshu. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2004-03-19. It is held in a private collection.

name_romaji: Haba Hie Jinja no Haiden Ranma Chōkoku
name_en: Transom Carvings of the Worship Hall of Haba Hie Shrine
description_en: A building element, the transom (ranma) carvings of the worship hall of Haba Hie Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2008-04-01. It is located at Haba 588-1.
An old document, a vermilion-seal letter (shuinjō) of Takeda Katsuyori. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2012-03-01. It is held in a private collection.
A building, the protective shelter (ōiya) of Komochi Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2014-09-01. It is located at Kammoku 528-1.
A building, the residence of the Kawai family. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2014-09-01. It is located at Higashimine 220.
A painting, the ceiling paintings (tenjō-e) of Tajima-in. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2015-06-02. It is located at Aramaki 3587-1.
A painting, the ceiling paintings (tenjō-e) of Kofuku-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2015-06-02. It is located at Haba 1792.

name_en: Ceiling Paintings of Haba Hie Shrine
description_en: A painting, the ceiling paintings (tenjō-e) of Haba Hie Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2015-06-02. It is located at Haba 588-1.
A painting, the ceiling paintings (tenjō-e) of Nyoi-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2016-03-17. It is located at Kamitsu 2578.
A painting, the ceiling paintings (tenjō-e) of Ryukoku-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Minakami Town on 2016-03-17. It is located at Moro 1668.

name_en: Lion Dance of Odaka Suwa Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Odaka Suwa Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1970-04-01. It is currently suspended.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Ogawa Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1970-04-01. It is performed at Ogawa 1049-1.

name_romaji: Sarugakyō Shinmei Jinja no Shintō Shūseiha Daidai Kagura
name_en: Shinto Shuseiha Daidai Kagura of Sarugakyo Shinmei Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Shinto Shuseiha daidai kagura sacred dance of Sarugakyo Shinmei Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is performed at Sarugakyo Onsen 1500-2.

name_en: Daidai Mikagura of Fuse Inari Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai mikagura sacred dance of Fuse Inari Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is performed at Fuse 2013.

name_romaji: Niiharu-mura Bon Odori “Yotsuashi, Mutsuashi, Yoiyasa Ashi”
name_en: Niiharu Village Bon Dance (Yotsuashi, Mutsuashi, Yoiyasa Ashi)
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Bon dance of Niiharu Village comprising the Yotsuashi, Mutsuashi and Yoiyasa Ashi steps. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is currently suspended.
An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Fujiwara. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1985-07-19. It is performed at Fujiwara 3419.

name_romaji: Suguri Hachiman Jinja no Daidai Kagura
name_en: Daidai Kagura of Suguri Hachiman Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Suguri Hachiman Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1992-02-04. It is performed at Kamitsu 1233.

name_en: Daidai Kagura of Komatsu Hachimangu Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Komatsu Hachimangu Shrine. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1993-12-14. It is performed at Shimozu 4299-2.
A monument, the ruins of Ogawa Castle, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1970-04-01. It is located at Tsukiyono 1125.
A monument, the ruins of Ishikura Castle, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1970-04-01. It is located at Ishikura 1788.
A monument, the site of the principal inn (honjin) of Nagai-juku post town, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is located at Nagai 467.
A monument, the site of the Gokan mansion (yakata), designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1975-05-21. It is located at Gokan 466.
A monument, the Yatsuhagi cave archaeological site, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1978-04-01. It is located at Gokan 3430.
A monument, the Tsukahara group of ancient burial mounds (kofun), designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1978-04-01. It is located at Kamitsu 355-1.
A monument, the Wakamiya burial mound associated with Princess Nyoi, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1983-06-01. It is located at Kamitsu 1233.

name_romaji: Mandokoro Sawaguchi Iseki no Seitetsuro Ato
name_en: Ironmaking Furnace Site at the Mandokoro Sawaguchi Site
description_en: A monument, the ironmaking furnace (seitetsuro) remains at the Mandokoro Sawaguchi archaeological site, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1990-08-07. It is located at Mandokoro 307.
A monument, the ruins of Sarugakyo Castle, designated as a historic site. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2017-05-26. It is located at Sarugakyo Onsen 128.

name_en: Onuma (Gongen-numa) Forest Green Tree Frog Breeding Ground
description_en: A monument, the breeding ground of the forest green tree frog (Moriaogaeru) at Onuma, also called Gongen-numa, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1973-07-01. It is located at Onuma Numadaira.
A monument, the primeval forest (genseirin) at Nagai Shimoyashiki, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is located at Nagai Shimoyashiki.
A monument, the great ginkgo tree (ōichō) of Kaien-ji, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is located at Aimata 32.
